name: microsoft-fabric-iq-mcp
title: Microsoft Fabric IQ
summary: Enables ontology discovery and entity type exploration for agentic workflows powered by Fabric IQ.
description: Provides programmatic access to the Fabric IQ ontology layer for agentic workflows: search the business ontology to discover entities, relationships, and properties, and enumerate available entity types with their schemas and metadata. Typical scenarios include data discovery for multi-agent orchestration, mapping business concepts to underlying data models, identifying relevant entity types before querying or acting on enterprise data, and validating ontology coverage for integration and reporting workflows.

useCases.name: Discover entity types
useCases.description: Enumerate available entity types in the Fabric IQ ontology to understand the data model and identify relevant business entities for querying.

useCases.name: Explore ontology structure
useCases.description: Search the ontology to understand relationships, properties, and hierarchies across business entities for data-driven decision making.

useCases.name: Find domain-specific entities
useCases.description: Search the ontology with domain keywords to locate relevant entity types such as customers, products, or transactions for targeted analysis.

useCases.name: Map data for agent workflows
useCases.description: Use entity type discovery and ontology search to identify the right data sources and schemas before orchestrating downstream agent actions.

useCases.name: Validate data model coverage
useCases.description: List all entity types and search ontology definitions to verify that required business concepts are modeled and accessible for integration scenarios.

fabriciqmcp.description: Authenticate with A365 using OAuth2 authorization code flow with PKCE support.
